# AT+CREG responses — network registration status
# Format: +CREG: <n>,<stat>[,<lac>,<ci>[,<AcT>]]
# stat: 0=not registered, 1=home, 2=searching, 3=denied, 4=unknown, 5=roaming

# Registered on home network (stat=1)
+CREG: 0,1
OK

# Registered, roaming (stat=5)
+CREG: 0,5
OK

# Not registered, searching (stat=2)
+CREG: 0,2
OK

# Registration denied (stat=3)
+CREG: 0,3
OK

# Not registered, not searching (stat=0)
+CREG: 0,0
OK

# Registered home network with LAC and CellID (n=2 verbose mode)
+CREG: 2,1,"1A2B","3C4D",7
OK

# Roaming with location info
+CREG: 2,5,"FF01","A001",6
OK

# Error (SIM not inserted)
+CME ERROR: 10
